title: Essencion
description: Essencion gives you permanent effects at the start of the game to help with your progress.
body:
# Essencion

This Mod adds a group of items called Essence, when you start a game you get a Blank Essence, and when right clicked it will transform into one of the seven possible Essences:

- Strength Essence
- Boost Essence
- Wealth Essence
- Ocean Essence
- Heart Essence
- Air Essence
- Cave Essence
 

Each of these gives permanent effects to the player, helping with progression. To change your Essence you must craft a Essence Switcher, using 3 of each Shard scattered across the dimensions. This will allow you to reset your Essence and choose a new one.
